---
title: "Getting Started"
description: "Quick tutorial to get up and running with python-nix-template"
---

# Getting Started with python-nix-template

This tutorial will walk you through the basic usage of python-nix-template.

## Prerequisites

Before you begin, make sure you have:

- Python 3.12 or higher
- UV package manager
- Nix (optional, but recommended)

## Installation

See the [Installation Guide](../guides/installation.qmd) for detailed installation instructions.

## Basic Usage

```python
# Example usage will be added here
print("Hello from pnt-core!")
```

## Next Steps

- Explore the [Development Guide](../guides/development.qmd)
- Check out the [API Reference](../reference/index.qmd)
